items.title: FINAL: Knicks 86, Pistons 75. They fall to 1-2 overall. Another strong performance from Chaz Lanier (24 points, 8-12 from 3). Ebuka Okorie finished with 14 points, 6 rebounds and 4 assists but shot 5-18 overall. He's been adjusting to the physicality.
items.author: Omari Sankofa II
items.body_excerpt: FINAL: Knicks 86, Pistons 75. They fall to 1-2 overall. Another strong performance from Chaz Lanier (24 points, 8-12 from 3). Ebuka Okorie finished with 14 points, 6 rebounds and 4 assists but shot 5-18 overall. He's been adjusting to the physicality.

items.title: Inspired by 82-0, we have put together this game we have called 73-9.
items.author: HoopsHype
items.body_excerpt:
Inspired by 82-0, we have put together this game we have called 73-9.

You have $100 million to spend on players to try to beat the 2015-16 Warriors.

It's a long shot, especially because you are constrained by money.

Shoot your shot, though!

Link: hoopsmatic.com/73-9-game

items.title: Tie ball game at 45 at halftime which is remarkable considering where this thing seemed to be going. Pacers 12 of 33 from the floor, 5 of 12 from 3, 8 of 12 at the line. Raptors 17 of 40, 3 of 13, 5 of 7. Mast 13 points, Slawson 10, Yuki 8. Lundy 11, Bradley 10.

items.body_excerpt:
Chatted with VJ Edgecombe today in Vegas. He said he accidentally missed Jameer Nelson’s calls about the Jaylen Brown trade and would love to add LeBron

“He’s still, to me, the greatest player of all time. If I get to play alongside LeBron, that would be amazing.”

www.inquirer.com/sixers/sixer...

media.title: VJ Edgecombe was ‘shocked’ by the Jaylen Brown trade, and loves the Sixers’ pursuit of LeBron James
media.description: Edgecombe said, "If I get to play alongside LeBron, that would be amazing" while visiting the Sixers' Summer League team in Las Vegas. James is still reportedly considering signing with the Sixers.

items.title: Anthony Morrow's HILARIOUS STORY of taking Corey Maggette's NEW MERCEDES-BENZ car | Jeff Teague
items.author: Club 520 Podcast
items.body_excerpt: After joining the Golden State Warriors as a rookie, Anthony Morrow became known as the guy who walked in Oakland and didn't have a car! A-Mo tells Jeff Teague, DJ, and B Hen the hilarious story of his teammate Corey Maggette letting him borrow his Mercedes-Benz S-Class 500 car…
